evals.prompt: Set up this project's AI assistant config around a shared AGENTS.md so Claude Code and Copilot use one source of truth.
evals.expected_output: Freshly-scaffolded NestJS app with no AI config. AGENTS.md (CREATE) with a `## Coding guidelines` section citing karpathy-guidelines. CLAUDE.md (CREATE) with exactly one `@AGENTS.md` import. No guidelines duplicated into tool files.

evals.prompt: Init this NestJS service's AI assistant config around a shared AGENTS.md.
evals.expected_output: Existing NestJS service with a CLAUDE.md (service notes) and no AGENTS.md. AGENTS.md (CREATE). Existing CLAUDE.md notes preserved (the `orders-ingest-v2` consumer-group note stays) and exactly one `@AGENTS.md` import added. Guidelines not duplicated into CLAUDE.md.

evals.prompt: Set up the AI assistant config for this library.
evals.expected_output: TypeScript library already fully wired (AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md/@AGENTS.md + GEMINI.md/@AGENTS.md + .vscode/settings.json). Idempotency: re-running produces an EMPTY diff.
